FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.title: Yu Qu
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.description: At the start of the run, add any number of quest cards from Mi Wang, Ku Xiu, Liu Lang, and Fa Wei to your Deck.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.flavor: Between taking and leaving, fate already turns.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU.selectionPrompt: Choose quest cards to add to your Deck (any amount).
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.title: Yu Qu Yu Duo
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.description: At the start of the run, add any number of quest cards from Mi Wang, Ku Xiu, Liu Lang, and Fa Wei to your Deck. Relics gained from quest cards are upgraded.
FEIYAP_RELIC_YU_QU_YU_DUO.flavor: To take and to seize, all in one thought.
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.title: Investigator
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.description: Gain the Ancient card Ke Xue Zheng. At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{RegenPower}[/blue] [gold]Regen[/gold].
FEIYAP_RELIC_INVESTIGATOR.flavor: "We will meet again, because you are..." — Investigator, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.title: Fei Sheng Yi Wen Zi
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.descrip: Gain the Ancient card Ke Xue Zheng. At the start of each combat, gain [blue]{RegenPower}[/blue] [gold]Regen[/gold].
FEIYAP_RELIC_FEI_SHENG_YI_WEN_ZI.flavor: "We will meet again, because you are..." — Investigator, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.title: Sword Saint
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.description:
Gain the Ancient card Fei Ying Yu Hua Luo.
[gold]Iaido[/gold] deals [blue]50%[/blue] more damage.
FEIYAP_RELIC_SWORD_SAINT.flavor: "The battlefield, a homeland I miss..." — Sword Saint, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.title: Wu Ming Ren
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.description:
Gain the Ancient card Fei Ying Yu Hua Luo.
[gold]Iaido[/gold] deals [blue]100%[/blue] more damage.
FEIYAP_RELIC_WU_MING_REN.flavor: "The battlefield, truly a homeland I miss..." — Sword Saint, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_STAR_SLAYER.title: Star Slayer
FEIYAP_RELIC_STAR_SLAYER.description: Gain the Ancient card Wu Sheng Xing Yun. At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{FeiyapVoidHolePower}[/blue] [gold]Void Hole[/gold] to ALL enemies.
FEIYAP_RELIC_STAR_SLAYER.flavor: "Even light cannot escape my grasp — what hope do you have?" — Star Slayer, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_XING_JIAN.title: Tian Xing Jian
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_XING_JIAN.description: Gain the Ancient card Wu Sheng Xing Yun. At the start of each combat, apply [blue]{FeiyapVoidHolePower}[/blue] [gold]Void Hole[/gold] to ALL enemies.
FEIYAP_RELIC_TIAN_XING_JIAN.flavor: "Even light cannot escape my grasp — what hope do you have?" — Star Slayer, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.title: Merry Witch
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.description: Gain the Ancient card World XXI. When alternating [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], damage and [gold]Block[/gold] gained are increased by [blue]25%[/blue].
FEIYAP_RELIC_MERRY_WITCH.flavor: "Will this world be more interesting than the last?" — Merry Witch, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.title: Kuang Xiao Mo Nv
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.descriptio: Gain the Ancient card World XXI. When alternating [gold]Attacks[/gold] and [gold]Skills[/gold], damage, [gold]Block[/gold], and [gold]Iaido[/gold] value are increased by [blue]50%[/blue].
FEIYAP_RELIC_KUANG_XIAO_MO_NV.flavor: "Dance! Sing! Entertain me with all you have — until the end of your life!" — Merry Witch, Feiyap Clan.
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.title: Laplace Demon
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.description: Gain the Ancient card World Shards. Upon pickup, also gain Archaic Tooth and Touch of Orobas. All card rewards are upgraded.
FEIYAP_RELIC_LAPLACE_DEMON.flavor: "I have seen every future. You are not in them." — Feiyap Clan.
